summary: The captured pages are a brochure-style construction services site with company story, services, clients, callback, and booking entry points. Lead capture and appointment requests can be handled via email or an external scheduling tool, so a custom Postgres database is not required.

architecture.database_rationale: The captured pages are a brochure-style construction services site with company story, services, clients, callback, and booking entry points. Lead capture and appointment requests can be handled via email or an external scheduling tool, so a custom Postgres database is not required.

integrations.name: Resend
integrations.purpose: Send client callback, contact, and service inquiry form submissions to the business by email.

integrations.name: Calendly or Cal.com
integrations.purpose: Handle online booking or consultation scheduling without building a custom scheduling backend.

integrations.name: Cloudflare Turnstile
integrations.purpose: Protect callback and inquiry forms from spam submissions.
